market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Premium Anfield Stay – Walk 3 mins, Space for 4
Elite Home Near Anfield – 5‑star Rating, 5 Reviews
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your exclusive, fully self‑contained home just a three‑minute stroll from Liverpool’s iconic Anfield Stadium. This entire‑home accommodation comfortably sleeps up to four guests, offering spacious sleeping arrangements, a private entrance, and a welcoming living area perfect for unwinding after a match day. The modern kitchen comes equipped with essential appliances, allowing you to prepare meals just as you like them. Every room has been thoughtfully arranged to provide a calm, premium experience, from the bright bedrooms to the clean, well‑maintained bathroom. With a flawless 5.0 rating from five glowing reviews, previous guests have praised the immaculate condition and unbeatable location. Although the property is not yet listed under the Superhost program, the high standard of cleanliness and service sets a comparable benchmark. Priced at £490 per night, this listing targets travelers seeking a high‑end, convenient base for football fans and city explorers alike. Book now to enjoy the short walk to Anfield, easy access to Liverpool’s vibrant centre, and a tranquil retreat that feels like a private loft in the heart of the action.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑staged living‑room shot as the cover photo to showcase the property’s size and premium feel, followed by images of the bedrooms, kitchen, and exterior.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £490 (180% above the cohort median of £175) to a more competitive level to raise the 90‑day occupancy from the current 16.3% toward the market median of 28.3%.
Add and prominently list high‑value amenities such as outdoor space, guest parking, and entertainment options, which are missing and could attract higher‑spending travelers.
Upload a full set of high‑resolution photos covering every room and set the living‑area image as the cover; the current unknown photo count is likely zero, hurting visual appeal.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing commands £490/night—180% above the city median—yet only 16% of nights are booked in the next 90 days.
